title: Apply workflow foundations to orchestration and cloud agents
description: Adopt the new shared workflow design-system foundations in the orchestration prototype and one adjacent surface so status semantics, section grouping, and empty states are proven beyond the foundation layer. This exists because the new primitives now need to replace one-off styling in a real workflow surface.

title: Apply workflow foundations to orchestration and hooks
description: Track the Phase 02 integration pass that refactors the orchestration prototype and hooks surface to consume the shared workflow design-system foundations, validates behavior with tests/checks, and lands the playbook update.

title: Design system foundations for orchestration workflows
description: Create the first shared design-system foundations for orchestration-heavy workflows by extracting VS Code token-backed spacing, density, panel grouping, status badge, empty state, metric row, and action toolbar primitives for the webview UI. This exists so orchestration and adjacent surfaces can share consistent status semantics and section layout without introducing a parallel styling system.

title: Validate orchestration read model task
description: Verify the first open Maestro playbook task for the unified orchestration read model, make any minimal fixes needed, update the playbook checkbox, and land the result.

title: Phase 01 orchestration prototype
description: Implement the phase 01 running-agents orchestration prototype by reusing existing running-agent, agent-chat, and cloud-agent surfaces. Deliver a unified read model, extension/webview prototype, reactive updates, architecture notes, and tests, then run the required quality gates.

title: Corrigir CHANGELOG.md
description: O CHANGELOG.md do repositório está inconsistente com o histórico real de tags e commits. Reconstruir o conteúdo com base nas versões publicadas e mudanças relevantes.
